modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty sharing a Google Site with others.

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to share their Google Site. They are unsure of the steps needed to do this. They want to ensure that others can access the site easily. This is causing some frustration during the live chat session.
short_description: Difficulty sharing a Google Site with others.
description: The user is trying to share their Google Site. They are unsure of the steps needed to do this. They want to ensure that others can access the site easily. This is causing some frustration during the live chat session.
